Substitution risk exists because Azure faces competition from cloud service providers and open-source offerings, and Microsoft AI offerings compete with hyperscalers, emerging competitors, and open-source offerings (FY2025 Form 10-K, Part I, Item 1, Intelligent Cloud — Competition).
